:tantalum.libera.chat NOTICE * :*** No Ident response

:tantalum.libera.chat 372 E6NICK :- free & open-source software and peer directed projects.

:tantalum.libera.chat 372 E6NICK :- To reduce network abuses we perform open proxy checks
:tantalum.libera.chat 372 E6NICK :- on hosts at connection time.
